name: THE DOJO OF MOCHIKO
short_description: For just $1, battle through a fast-paced samurai fighting game where enemies grow stronger with each fight. Face relentless foes in the dojo, testing your skills and strategy. Only the strongest warriors can survive the final challenge and claim the title of the ultimate samurai!
detailed_description:
The way of the samurai is forged by training and fighting. Step into MOCHIKO's dojo, an unforgiving training ground where only the strongest survive. This time, there are no villages to save—only yourself to conquer.

Test your skills against **20 intense levels** in this fast-paced action game. Master legendary swords and ancient magic, dodge deadly attacks, and hone your techniques. With each level, your enemies become more powerful. Will you survive or fall?

🔥 **Fast-paced combat:** Slash your enemies with precise melee attacks.

⚔️ **Evade and counter:** Dodge danger and strike back at the perfect moment.

🌀 **Harness ancient magic:** Unleash powerful spells to defeat your foes.

💀 **Survive 20 brutal levels:** The challenge keeps increasing. Only the best will make it to the end.

This standalone **Dojo Trial** is your chance to experience **a glimpse into the larger world of Mochiko**. It is a stepping stone to the next big adventure featuring our VTuber, Mochiko. 💥 **Are you ready to prove yourself?** Enter the dojo and fight!

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
